name: CARDIAC FIBROMA
definition: FIBROMATOSIS = FIBROUS HAMARTOMA = FIBROELASTIC HAMARTOMA congenital neoplasm / hamartoma of the heart

demographics.Prevalence: 100 cases reported; 2nd most common benign cardiac neoplasm of childhood (after
demographics.Mean age: 13 (range, 0-56) years; 33% in children < 1 year of age / in utero; 15% in
demographics.Location: ventricular septum > left ventricular free wall

distribution: ventricular septum > left ventricular free wall
discriminating_features: focal cardiac bulge ← tumor in free ventricular wall

general: focal cardiac bulge ← tumor in free ventricular wall
mean diameter > 5 cm; may obliterate cardiac chamber
CT: homogeneous mural mass of soft-issue attenuation
MR: iso- / hypointense homogeneous discrete mural mass / myocardial thickening on T1WI
no / little hetero- or homogeneous enhancement

clinical.Cx: fetal hydrops ← obstruction, pericardial effusion, fetal arrhythmia, fetal death
